## Alphabet stock jumps on reports Google is building custom AI chip to improve Gemini inference efficiency

Custom silicon for Gemini is a structural margin lever — reduced inference costs at scale directly improve GOOGL's foundation model economics and reduce long-run dependence on merchant silicon; also reinforces the broader hyperscaler in-house chip trend that compresses the merchant silicon addressable market over time.

- GOOGL shares rallied following reports of an internal custom AI chip program targeting Gemini model efficiency
- In-house silicon strategy framed as a cost-reduction lever for inference at scale
- No chip specifications, development timeline, or financial impact quantified in headline
- High classifier confidence: confirms foundation model economics and in-house silicon architecture themes
